'''Lenz''' was the leader of the [[Workers]], in [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]]. His face was marked by the paralyzing drug that the [[Absolutes]] used on their prisoners.

He took care of [[Alani]] and [[Eritha]] when their father, [[Ewane]], was imprisoned. Later, he helped [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] finding [[Tahl]], telling them where they could find a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] to trail her kidnapper, [[Balog (Human)|Balog]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Call to Vengeance]]''
